subcodes.title: Letter to Mulla Ahmad Mu'allim Hisari
subcodes.first_line: As to what thou hast mentioned concerning the degrees of difference, what hast thou to do with relating such accounts? For verily the outer form of religion conformeth to its inner truth [3.5s]... ...As for what you have asked about the pure leaf, concerning the fact that she has claimed for herself the station of being a proof for others
subcodes.first_line_orig: و ان ما ذکرت من مراتب الاختلاف فمالک و ذکر تلک الاخبار فان ظاهر الدین هو طبق باطنه
subcodes.subjects: @Tahirih [Qurratu'l-'Ayn], @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations
